Join Our Team
DataKinetics Careers

DataKinetics helps drive the world’s financial transactions. Since our humble beginnings over 45 years ago, DataKinetics products now power nearly a billion mission-critical transactions per second every day for the world’s largest banking, insurance, credit card, brokerage house and retail organizations.

DataKinetics helps customers resolve mainframe performance and capacity challenges. Specifically focused on the global Fortune 500 companies, they provide customers the following solutions: batch window relief, transaction optimization, Java to Db2 access optimizations and replication solutions. These solutions have enabled their customers to realize increased capacity and performance from their existing infrastructure, while decreasing overall cost.

Sound interesting so far?

Here’s the best part. DataKinetics is a company with genuine people who you’ll actually enjoy working with every single day. A company that has been recognized for its considerable contributions to the community and to the way it treats its team members.

Most importantly, DataKinetics offers a “politics free zone” where everyone contributes equally to our success. Some have been doing it for 30 years.
